ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Full address of the headquarters */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for publicly traded companies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company in USD */,
  "growth" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the company in percentage */,
  "profit" REAL /* Annual profit of the company in USD */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Annual expenses of the company in USD */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Annual net income of the company in USD */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Annual cash flow of the company in USD */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity of the company in USD */,
  "debt" REAL /* Total debt of the company in USD */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company in USD */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization in USD */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin as a percentage */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin as a percentage */,
  "net_margin" REAL /* Net margin as a percentage */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on Equity as a percentage */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on Assets as a percentage */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt to Equity ratio */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  "quick_ratio" REAL /* Quick ratio */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings Per Share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield as a percentage */,
  "dividend_per_share" REAL /* Dividend per share in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Broad sector the industry belongs to */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry */,
  "average_growth_rate" REAL /* Average growth rate of companies in the industry */,
  "average_revenue" REAL /* Average revenue of companies in the industry */,
  "average_profit" REAL /* Average profit of companies in the industry */,
  "average_employee_count" INTEGER /* Average number of employees in the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)
